sections.paragraph: & שְׁבֻעָה fem. (from the verb שָׁבַע), an oath, Gen 26:3 24:8 . שְׁבֻעַת יְהֹוָה an oath by Jehovah, Exo 22:10 Ecc 8:2 also, followed by a genit. of the swearer, Psa 105:9 and of the person sworn to, שְׁבֻעָתִי the oath sworn to me, Gen 24:8. נִשְׁבַּע שְׁבֻעַה to swear an oath, Gen 26:3 Jos 9:20. Specially-(a) of an oath sworn in making a covenant, a covenant confirmed by an oath, 2Sa 21:7. בַּעֲלֵי שְׁבוּעָה לְ joined in league with any one. LXX. ἔνορκοι, Neh 6:18.-(b) an oath of execration, execration, imprecation; fully שְׁבוּעַת הָאָלָה Num 5:21 Dan 9:11 Isa 65:15.
